name: Rand Paul
subject: Down to the wire
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Fellow Conservative,

In 24 hours, the Senate votes on my bill to defund Planned Parenthood.

Time is running out. This vote will come down to the wire. And our money bomb is only about $57,583 shy of reaching our $200,000 goal.

Fellow Conservative, I really need your generous support right now.

**[Please chip in a contribution of $20.16 to help keep up the pressure on the Senate to vote for my bill to defund Planned Parenthood](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29483558:28271358773:m:1:879035888:61773B001E85109D1A8EFA5FD1403E07:r)**.

Pro-abortion Democrats who want to vote against my bill to stop taxpayer funding for Planned Parenthood will pay a steep price in the next election.

That's why a former Obama bundler and federal judge recently barred the release of any more videos until well after the U.S. Senate votes on my bill to defund Planned Parenthood!

But there's now no hiding the fact that Planned Parenthood is aborting babies, dismembering them, and selling their body parts for profit.

And instead of working to stop this madness, pro-abortion Democrats are fighting to expand it!

Within days of Barack Obama taking office, he signed an Executive Order reversing the Mexico City policy, allowing Planned Parenthood to receive even more taxpayer dollars.

And with the go ahead from President Obama, Hillary Clinton's State Department followed through with $236 MILLION in taxpayer dollars on top of the half a BILLION they already receive.

Now Planned Parenthood is fighting to install Hillary Clinton as the next President.

Where is the press forcing Hillary Clinton to answer tough questions on Planned Parenthood?

Planned Parenthood's ties to the Washington Machine run deep.

So as the clock ticks closer and closer to tomorrow's vote -- I expect Planned Parenthood's attacks to get even more vicious.

I need you on this one.

I'm counting on you to help push through their opposition and pass my bill to strip them of every last dime of taxpayer funding.

**[Please chip in $20.16 immediately](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29483558:28271358773:m:1:879035888:61773B001E85109D1A8EFA5FD1403E07:r)**.

Regardless of how tomorrow's vote goes, Planned Parenthood has lost.

The American people are seeing the truth about what they're doing to unborn little boys and girls.

I expect tomorrow's vote to come down to the wire. I'm counting on you to stand with me.

**[Please chip in a contribution of $20.16 to help keep up the pressure on the Senate to vote for my bill to defund Planned Parenthood](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29483558:28271358773:m:1:879035888:61773B001E85109D1A8EFA5FD1403E07:r)**.

It's critical we reach our $200,000 goal.

The clock is ticking.

And you and I have 24 hours to turn up the pressure on the Senate.

**[So please agree to your most generous contribution of $20.16 at once](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29483558:28271358773:m:1:879035888:61773B001E85109D1A8EFA5FD1403E07:r)**!

Thank you in advance for your generous support.

| ****[** dpwillis67@gmail.com **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29483558:28271358773:m:1:879035888:61773B001E85109D1A8EFA5FD1403E07:r "https://secure.randpaul.com/?planned-parenthood&sr=rhf080215nd")
**Contributed to DEFUND PLANNED PARENTHOOD Money Bomb?**
**## NO DONATION ##******
---

| [Chip in $10 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29483559:28271358773:m:1:879035888:61773B001E85109D1A8EFA5FD1403E07:r)
---
[Chip in $25 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29483560:28271358773:m:1:879035888:61773B001E85109D1A8EFA5FD1403E07:r)
[Chip in $50 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29483561:28271358773:m:1:879035888:61773B001E85109D1A8EFA5FD1403E07:r)
[Chip in $100 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29483562:28271358773:m:1:879035888:61773B001E85109D1A8EFA5FD1403E07:r)
[Or donate another amount >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29483558:28271358773:m:1:879035888:61773B001E85109D1A8EFA5FD1403E07:r)

In Liberty,

Rand Paul

name: Doug Stafford
subject: Smeared and silenced
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Fellow Conservative,

The U.S. Senate will vote tomorrow on Senator Paul's bill to cut off the flow of your tax dollars to Planned Parenthood.

Passage or failure will hinge on just a handful of votes.

With Planned Parenthood's massive public relations campaign peppering the Washington TV and radio markets with attack ads, I'm worried that anything could happen.

That's why I'm reaching out to you, Fellow Conservative, hoping that you know **[whatever amount you can afford to contribute right now will help decide the fate of Senator Paul's fight to defund Planned Parenthood](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29484266:28272153141:m:1:879035888:7860DCF2D666033315EA65965A3167EC:r)**.

It's no secret that Planned Parenthood has deep connections in Washington.

It's shameful how politicians bend to their will while ignoring the majority of Americans who are horrified by Planned Parenthood altering the way they execute unborn babies to salvage their organs for sale.

Hillary Clinton and Planned Parenthood's allies in Congress are going to pay a severe price for defending this madness.

The American people are seeing the truth about what they're doing to unborn little boys and girls.

Senator Paul is fighting tooth-and-nail to strip Planned Parenthood of every last dime of your taxpayer dollars.

He is standing strong for his convictions and refusing to bow down -- and for that reason, **[I hope you'll help Senator Paul reach his $200,000 goal before tomorrow's vote](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29484266:28272153141:m:1:879035888:7860DCF2D666033315EA65965A3167EC:r)**.

Our TV, radio, and Internet ads are the quickest and most effective way to whip up the grassroots firestorm needed to dial up the heat on the Senate to support Rand's bill.

Fellow Conservative -- regardless of tomorrow's outcome, Planned Parenthood has lost.

There's no hiding the fact that Planned Parenthood is aborting babies, dismembering them, and selling their body parts for profit.

Now, their allies in Congress must either defend these atrocities and risk facing the wrath of an angry electorate -- or abide by the will of voters and support Rand's bill.

I believe we can WIN this vote if a grassroots uprising swarms the halls of Congress, stares down the Abortion Lobby, and sends a loud-and-clear message to every single U.S. Senator: "You have two options: 1) vote FOR Senator Paul's Defund Planned Parenthood bill or 2) lose your seat!"

If you agree, please help crank up the heat on Congress **[by chipping in your most generous contribution before time runs out -- and remember, the more you give the more we can do](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29484266:28272153141:m:1:879035888:7860DCF2D666033315EA65965A3167EC:r)**.

Thank you for your continued support.

| ****[** dpwillis67@gmail.com **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29484266:28272153141:m:1:879035888:7860DCF2D666033315EA65965A3167EC:r "https://secure.randpaul.com/?planned-parenthood&sr=rhf080215d1")
**Contributed to DEFUND PLANNED PARENTHOOD Money Bomb?**
**## NO DONATION ##******
---

In Liberty,

Doug Stafford
Chief Strategist

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29484266:28272153141:m:1:879035888:7860DCF2D666033315EA65965A3167EC:r)

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29484267:28272153141:m:1:879035888:7860DCF2D666033315EA65965A3167EC:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29484268:28272153141:m:1:879035888:7860DCF2D666033315EA65965A3167EC:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29484269:28272153141:m:1:879035888:7860DCF2D666033315EA65965A3167EC:r)

name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: Thank you!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
Friend, In the month of July, we continued to build momentum by focusing on issues important to Maryland and our nation. I have travelled throughout Maryland talking to people about a range of challenges including building an economy that works for all, expanding educational opportunities, ending the corrosive influence of secret outside money in campaigns, protecting the Chesapeake Bay, and combatting climate change. Meanwhile, thanks to you, our issues-based, people-powered campaign has continued to grow. **Last week, all of you proved that in a big way. We finished July in a strong position, beating our goal and building real momentum. THANK YOU!** We are on the move--just check out some recent headlines: **_THE BALTIMORE SUN_** July 13, 2015 Rep. Van Hollen picks up support from environmental advocates Last month, nearly 80 of Maryland's leading activists and advocates for protecting the environment signed on in support of our campaign, citing our work together to protect the Chesapeake Bay, promote clean energy, fund land conservation programs and combat global climate change. I'm honored to have the support of this group of tireless environmental champions. _**POLITICO**_ July 15, 2015 Edwards rejects 'Free State Pledge' to block outside spending Building on Elizabeth Warren's example, I offered the "Free State Pledge" that would discourage spending from special interest groups and Super PACs in our race. This is an opportunity to lead by example and push back against the damaging results of the Citizens United decision. Unfortunately, my opponent declined to follow suit and rejected the pledge. _**THE WASHINGTON POST**_ July 30, 2015 Influential Baltimore politician backs Chris Van Hollen for Senate And last Thursday, I was thrilled to get the endorsement of state Del. Maggie McIntosh of Baltimore, one of Maryland's most important political figures. Speaking at a popular Baltimore diner, I was very honored to hear Maggie call upon Marylanders to support "one of the most effective leaders that we have in Maryland." This growing momentum would not have happened without your incredible support. Over the coming weeks and months, it's critical that we stay connected. I don't want you to miss any critical news or opportunities to take action and help grow our campaign. The best way to stay in the know is by [**liking our campaign on Facebook**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91e97/70cdc2ba/479e6af6/3950e99/2639319852/VEsH/ "https://www.facebook.com/VanHollenForMD") and [**following us on Twitter**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91e97/70cdc2ba/479e6af6/3950e96/2639319852/VEsE/ "https://twitter.com/vanhollenformd") - and be sure to check out some of these great articles while you're there. Thanks for all your support, Chris
| Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
---
We believe that emails are a vital way to stay in direct contact with supporters. You're receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com. [**Click here**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91e97/70cdc2ba/479e6af6/3950e97/2639319852/VEsF/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/unsubscribe") if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages, please enter dpwillis67@gmail.com to ensure that we are able to unsubscribe you from our list.

name: randhpaulmd@gmail.com
subject: Who will stand?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Fellow Conservative,

Who will stand with the American people?

And who will stand with Planned Parenthood and their horrific practice of aborting babies, dismembering them, and selling off their body parts for profit?

Tomorrow, when the U.S. Senate votes on my bill to strip Planned Parenthood of every dime of taxpayer funding, you and I will find out.

I believe just a handful of votes will decide my bill's fate.

**[So with time running out, please help me reach our $200,000 goal to help me turn up maximum pressure on my U.S. Senate colleagues with your most generous contribution of $20.16 TODAY](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29484942:28273383239:m:1:879035888:EA6C94E3599314C96715D8D0F44B4E0C:r)**!

With Congress' power of the purse, this is one fight you and I can win -- even with President Obama in the White House.

But regardless of how the votes go tomorrow, Planned Parenthood has lost.

Gone are the flowery euphemisms they use to conceal truth.

Instead, the recent undercover videos that have galvanized Americans over the past few weeks showed:

*** Dr. Deborah Nucatola, Planned Parenthood's leading abortionist, discussing how she skirts federal law to perform partial birth abortions, and uses special care when aborting babies to preserve their organs for sale -- all while munching a salad;

*** Another Planned Parenthood Executive joking "I want a Lamborghini" while discussing the price of unborn baby parts;

*** A Planned Parenthood worker admitting she nearly passed out when she was asked to dissect a freshly-aborted baby -- and another shouting "five stars" as a worker announced she found intact kidneys after picking through aborted baby parts.

Even after all of this, if my colleagues would rather stand with Planned Parenthood than the American people, they'll pay a severe political price.

Fellow Conservative, this vote will be close.

**[With time running out, please agree to your most generous gift of $20.16 at once](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29484942:28273383239:m:1:879035888:EA6C94E3599314C96715D8D0F44B4E0C:r)**.

Your support will make all the difference.

| ****[** dpwillis67@gmail.com **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29484942:28273383239:m:1:879035888:EA6C94E3599314C96715D8D0F44B4E0C:r "https://secure.randpaul.com/?planned-parenthood&sr=rhf080215nd2")
**Contributed to DEFUND PLANNED PARENTHOOD Money Bomb?**
**## NO DONATION ##******
---

| [Chip in $10 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29484943:28273383239:m:1:879035888:EA6C94E3599314C96715D8D0F44B4E0C:r)
---
[Chip in $25 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29484944:28273383239:m:1:879035888:EA6C94E3599314C96715D8D0F44B4E0C:r)
[Chip in $50 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29484945:28273383239:m:1:879035888:EA6C94E3599314C96715D8D0F44B4E0C:r)
[Chip in $100 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29484946:28273383239:m:1:879035888:EA6C94E3599314C96715D8D0F44B4E0C:r)
[Or donate another amount >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29484942:28273383239:m:1:879035888:EA6C94E3599314C96715D8D0F44B4E0C:r)

In Liberty,

Rand Paul

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29484942:28273383239:m:1:879035888:EA6C94E3599314C96715D8D0F44B4E0C:r)
